changeSet.author: dev
changeSet.comment: Partial covering index for URL-quota aggregate check on order creation. Excludes terminal statuses (CANCELLED/FAILED/ERROR/REFILL/SUSPENDED) to keep index small. INCLUDE columns enable index-only scans for the SUM(CASE WHEN ...) aggregate. The orders table is partitioned by created_at — PostgreSQL propagates the partial+covering index definition to every existing and future partition automatically.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_orders_quota_check ON orders (service_id, link, created_at) INCLUDE (status, quantity, remains) WHERE status IN ('PENDING','IN_PROGRESS','PROCESSING','ACTIVE', 'PARTIAL','COMPLETED','PAUSED','HOLDING');
